message:
refactor(abi): move strncmp unit tests from inline mod to dedicated test file

Extract strncmp tests (strncmp_returns_zero_for_n_zero, strncmp_obeys_count_limit,
strncmp_treats_terminator_as_end_of_compare) from inline #[cfg(test)] mod in
string_abi.rs to crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/string_abi_test.rs, following
the project convention of separating test files from implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
